body: I'm not sure why this was added, so we will see if something breaks. But through usage I've realized that its inconvenient (and unexpected) that the length of `FieldTimeSeries` depends on the backend. My intuition is that the length stays the same regardless of _where_ the data is (in memory, or on disk, or a combination of the two). It's also helpful that behavior is the same between backends, which makes switching backends for performance reasons painless.
title: Don't return special length for PartlyInMemory time series
